cta.description: Still have questions? We're here to help!

documents.question: What documents do I need to rent a car?
documents.answer: You need a valid driver's license, passport or national ID, and a credit card for the security deposit. International drivers may need an International Driving Permit.

minimum_age.question: Is there a minimum age requirement for renting?
minimum_age.answer: Yes, drivers must be at least 21 years old. Young drivers between 21 and 24 may incur an additional daily fee.

rental_included.question: What is included in the rental price?
rental_included.answer: Our rental prices include basic insurance coverage, unlimited mileage, 24/7 roadside assistance, and GPS navigation. Premium insurance options are available for additional coverage.

modify_cancel.question: Can I modify or cancel my reservation?
modify_cancel.answer: Yes, you can modify or cancel your reservation up to 24 hours before pickup for a full refund. Changes within 24 hours may incur a fee.

delivery_pickup.question: Do you offer delivery and pickup services?
delivery_pickup.answer: Yes, we offer convenient delivery and pickup services within our service area. Additional fees may apply based on location.

late_return.question: What happens if I return the car late?
late_return.answer: Late returns will incur additional daily charges. Please contact us immediately if you anticipate being late to avoid extra fees.

booking_advance.question: How far in advance should I book?
booking_advance.answer: We recommend booking at least 24 hours in advance for standard services and 48 to 72 hours for special events or peak travel periods.

payment_methods.question: What payment methods do you accept?
payment_methods.answer: We accept major credit cards, debit cards, and cash payments. Corporate billing can also be arranged for recurring clients.

airport_pickup.question: Do you provide airport pickup services?
airport_pickup.answer: Yes, we provide airport transfers with live flight monitoring to ensure timely pickup even if your flight is delayed.

booking_cancellation.question: What if I need to cancel my booking?
booking_cancellation.answer: Cancellations made at least 24 hours before the scheduled service are free of charge. Late cancellations may include a fee.

sale_financing.question: Do you offer financing or installment plans?
sale_financing.answer: Yes. We offer flexible financing and installment options through our partners. Tell us your budget and we'll tailor a monthly plan and handle the approval paperwork.

sale_inspection.question: Are your cars inspected before sale?
sale_inspection.answer: Every vehicle passes a comprehensive multi-point inspection before listing, and we share the full condition report so you can buy with confidence.

sale_warranty.question: Do the cars come with a warranty?
sale_warranty.answer: Many of our vehicles include a manufacturer or dealer warranty. We'll confirm the exact coverage for any car you're considering.

sale_test_drive.question: Can I book a test drive before buying?
sale_test_drive.answer: Absolutely. Book a viewing or test drive at a time that suits you, and our team will have the car ready.

sale_trade_in.question: Can I trade in my current car?
sale_trade_in.answer: Yes. We offer transparent trade-in valuations and can apply the value directly toward your purchase.

sale_ownership.question: How does ownership transfer and paperwork work?
sale_ownership.answer: We handle the full transfer process — registration, documentation, and title — so ownership passes to you smoothly once payment is complete.

generic_browse.question: How do I find the right car?
generic_browse.answer: Browse our full inventory and filter by brand, price, fuel, and more. If you'd like help narrowing it down, our team is happy to guide you.

generic_inspection.question: Can I view or inspect a car before deciding?
generic_inspection.answer: Yes. You're welcome to view any vehicle in person, and we share a detailed condition overview for every car.

generic_visit.question: Where are you located and can I visit?
generic_visit.answer: You can visit us at our showroom during business hours, or reach out and we'll arrange a convenient time.

generic_contact.question: How can I get in touch with you?
generic_contact.answer: Call, WhatsApp, or email us anytime — we usually reply within minutes and are happy to answer any question.
